notes: DigitalTQ tracked sample, n=630 packs: holo rare 137/630 (21.75%), V 80/630 (12.70%), VMAX 27/630 (4.29%), ultra rare 25/630 (3.97%), amazing rare 36/630 (5.71%), rainbow rare 8/630 (1.27%), secret rare 7/630 (1.11%). ThePriceDex aggregate matches the same rates. Amazing rares replace the reverse-holo slot (rare-slot rarities already sum to ~100% without them); other hits modeled in the rare slot with residual mass on non-holo rare. Reverse filler approximated as a 50/50 common/uncommon split. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. ETB SWSH era = 8 packs.
